What We Do

Here's what we do.

Our software takes modern solutions and applies them to your business — saving you time and money.

It's that simple. Here's how we do it.

A professional website built specifically for your trade — not a generic template you have to wrestle into shape. Most contractors lose work simply because they don't show up on Google, or their site looks like an afterthought next to the competition. With Bedrock Sites you answer a few plain questions, drop in your photos, and get a polished, mobile-ready site that's built to rank in local search. You preview the whole thing for free and only pay when you're ready to put it live. From there, editing it later takes minutes — no developer, no waiting.

→ Go to Bedrock Sites → See Our Work
Live Example · Mad Ox Outdoors
Admin Assistant & Customer Database

Donna is your operational admin secretary — sassy, smart, and always ready to handle the paperwork.

Donna — personal admin assistant Customer Database Project Tracking Estimates & Invoices

Tell Donna what you need in plain words — or talk it out on the drive home — and she drafts the estimate, invoice, receipt, or schedule. You review, tweak, and approve; nothing goes to a customer without your say-so. Every customer, project, and job stays organized in one place, and she learns your rates and fees as you go.

Think of Bedrock Digital as your toolbox. Each feature is a different tool — and nobody knows it better than you: you need the right tool for the right job. Bedrock Digital is how your tools interact with each other, making all of them more efficient and giving you a higher ROI on your time.

The Bedrock Ecosystem

One company. One connected system.

Most contractors juggle a different tool for the website, a different one for marketing, another for invoicing, and a fourth for chasing leads. Nothing talks. Bedrock connects them. One business profile powers your website, marketing materials, SEO, and finances — built specifically for the trades. Tap any part to see what it does.

What we do

The digital backbone for trade businesses.

You're great at your trade. You shouldn't have to be great at websites, SEO, invoicing, and marketing too. Bedrock handles the digital side — so you stay on the job, not behind a laptop.

Why It Matters

The trades are going digital.
The ones who move first win.

You don't have to become a tech company. You just can't afford to be the only one in your trade who isn't online and automated.

▲
01 · Customers search first

How customers actually find you in 2026

Almost nobody asks around for a contractor anymore — they pull out their phone and search. Three things decide whether they find you or your competitor:

Your Google Business Profile
This is the map and the "plumber near me" results — the first thing people see. It's free, but most contractors never fully claim or fill it out. That one gap is the biggest reason good shops stay invisible.
A real website — not just a Facebook page
Google needs a real site to rank you, and customers need one to trust you. A clean site with your services, your towns, and your work is what turns a search into a phone call.
Reviews & correct info
Right phone number, hours, and service area — plus a few honest reviews — is what tips someone from "found them" to "calling them."

Your Bedrock site is built to be found from day one — clean structure, your real services, the towns you cover — and we point you at the free Google Business Profile setup most contractors miss.

02 · Automation beats hustle

The work that should run without you

You can't answer a quote request from the top of a ladder. You don't have to — the loop below runs on its own while you're on the job:

You stay the one doing the work and making the calls. Software just makes sure no lead falls through the cracks while your hands are full.

03 · AI levels the field

A two-person shop that reads like a big outfit

The stuff that used to mean hiring a copywriter or burning a weekend — AI now does the first draft of in minutes:

Your site's words
Headlines, service descriptions, your About page, FAQs — written around your real story, not a generic template.
You stay in control
It removes the blank page; you keep the final say. Nothing goes live until it sounds like you.
The result
Your two-truck operation comes across as buttoned-up as the fifty-person company across town — without their overhead.

Bedrock does this part for you in the builder — you answer a few questions, it writes the draft, you edit anything you want.

04 · Speed is the moat

Most jobs go to whoever answers first

Not the cheapest bid — the first real response. When a customer reaches out, the clock starts:

The request lands at 9pm
Your site takes it any hour — you're not losing the job because you were asleep or on a roof.
An instant reply buys you time
An automatic "got it — I'll have a number to you today" keeps them from calling the next guy.
The quote goes out same-day
Fast becomes your default instead of a scramble — and fast is usually what wins.

Modern tools don't make you work more hours. They make the hours you're not working still count.

One company that actually understands
how trade businesses work.

Most software is built for office workers. Bedrock is built for contractors. Every tool runs off one shared business profile, so you never type the same thing twice, and the whole system gets smarter the more you use it.

01

Your business name, trade, service area, colors, and logo live in one profile. Enter it once and every tool already knows it.

Website, marketing, SEO, finances. Start with one tool, add more when it makes sense. Each one stands on its own.

03

One login. One dashboard. Your website, marketing, and billing in a single place built to stay simple.

Any questions? Check our FAQ →
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Click any section. Tap any question to expand the answer.

01 About Bedrock Digital The company & ecosystem
What is Bedrock Digital?

Bedrock Digital is a software company built specifically for trade businesses — plumbers, electricians, HVAC, landscapers, roofers, and other skilled trades. We make a connected ecosystem of tools (website, marketing, SEO, finance) that share one business profile so the contractor never has to set up the same information twice.

What's the difference between Bedrock Digital and a regular web/marketing agency?

Agencies build one thing at a time and charge you a separate fee each time. Bedrock builds a connected platform — your site, marketing, SEO, and finance tools all talk to each other through one profile. Same flat price every month, no surprise invoices, no back-and-forth.

Do I have to buy everything to start?

No. Every Bedrock tool is sold separately. Start with just Sites, just Marketing, or just the Optimizer. Add more anytime — everything you've already entered pre-fills the next tool. Bundles are available if you want more than one.

Where is Bedrock Digital based?

Bedrock is a US-based small business. Founder is currently based in Rexburg, ID, relocating to the Milwaukee area in 2026. We serve contractors nationwide.

How do I get support if something goes wrong?

Email support@bedrock-sites.com — you'll usually get a real reply same day. No tickets, no phone trees.

02 Bedrock Sites — Website Builder Live now
How much does a contractor website cost with Bedrock?

Flat $200 one-time setup fee plus $20/month for hosting, updates, and support. No surprise fees, no annual contracts, no agency markups. You see your complete site before you pay a cent.

How fast can I be live?

Most sites are ready to preview in under 20 minutes. After you approve and pay, your site typically goes live within a few hours — same day you decide.

Do I need any tech skills?

None. Answer a few plain questions about your business, our system builds a complete professional site, you preview it, make any edits you want, then pay when you're happy.

Can I use my own domain?

Yes. Use a domain you already own or we'll help you register a new one. All Bedrock sites include SSL, fast reliable hosting, and custom domain setup — all in the $20/month plan.

What trades is it built for?

Plumbers, electricians, HVAC, landscapers, roofers, painters, flooring, concrete, general contracting — if you do hands-on work and need customers to find you online, this is built for you.

Can I edit my site after it's live?

Yes — through your Client Portal. Change text, hours, phone, photos, services. Small changes are always free. Saved changes redeploy automatically.

03 Bedrock Marketing Brand kit + asset builder
What does Bedrock Marketing actually do?

You set up your Brand Kit once — colors, fonts, voice, logo — then turn out flyers, social posts, door hangers, yard signs, business cards, postcards, email signature banners, and Facebook covers in minutes. Each piece uses your brand automatically. Download as PNG, JPG, or PDF.

Does the AI write my copy?

Only when you ask it to. There's a "Generate copy with AI" button that writes a headline + subhead + call-to-action in your brand voice. You can also type everything manually — the button is optional.

Can I upload my existing logo and materials?

Yes. Upload your logo, and Bedrock will use it on every piece. We're also rolling out a feature to analyze any existing brochure or flyer you upload and pull your colors, fonts, and tone automatically.

Do my materials have to be printed by Bedrock?

No. You download the file (PNG, JPG, or PDF) and use it however you want — take the PDF to a local print shop, post the PNG to Facebook, attach the JPG to an email. Your file, your use.

Does Marketing include Sites or vice versa?

No — each tool is sold separately. They work better together (shared profile) but they're independent products. You can also bundle.

04 Bedrock Optimizer & SEO Search visibility
What does the Optimizer do?

It runs a 12-point audit on your website — mobile speed, local SEO signals, schema markup, page structure, FAQ coverage, and AI-search (GEO) readiness. You get a score out of 100 plus a prioritized fix list. Free.

Can I run the Optimizer on a site I didn't build with Bedrock?

Yes — that's the whole point. Paste in any contractor website URL and we audit it. If you build with Bedrock later, your portal version of the Optimizer also tracks improvements over time.

Will Bedrock also do the SEO fixes for me?

That's Bedrock SEO — the full optimization service. It's the paid version: we implement the schema, page structure, meta tags, and Google Business Profile work the audit flagged. Coming next.

What's "GEO" mean?

Generative Engine Optimization — whether AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Siri) describe your business correctly when someone asks "who's a good plumber in Milwaukee?". It uses FAQ schema, About content, and structured data signals. Bedrock includes GEO setup in every site.

Get your time back.
Focus on the parts of your business that matter most.

How it works

A real audit. Tested, trusted, and accurate.

1

Drop in your website

One field, no forms. Works with any site — Wix, Squarespace, an old agency build, anything.

2

We run the real checks

The same things Google and AI search judge you on. Honest score, 0–100. Same site, same score — every time.

3

See what to fix

Every check in plain English: why it matters, what we measured, and exactly how to fix it.

What we grade — 100 points
25 points

Performance

Does it load fast on a phone? Slow sites lose the customer before the page shows.

30 points

Local SEO

Phone, address, city in the title, HTTPS — the basics Google uses to rank you locally.

25 points

Schema

The invisible code that tells Google and AI what your business is and does.

20 points

GEO

Can ChatGPT, Siri, and Google AI actually find and recommend you?

How It Works

Four steps from zero to live.

No tech skills needed. No writing required. We do the heavy lifting around your story.

Step 1 of 4
1
Tell us about your business
Your business
Photos & logo
Preview & edit
Pay & go live
  1. Step 1

    Tell us about your business

    Answer a few quick questions about your trade, services, location, and style. Plain questions, about 10 minutes — like a text conversation. No writing required.

  2. Step 2

    Upload photos & logo

    Add your logo and job photos if you have them. No photos yet? We'll use clean placeholders you can swap out anytime later.

  3. Step 3

    Preview & edit your full site

    See your complete website — every section, built and ready. Tweak anything you want with the editor. All free, no card needed.

  4. Step 4

    Pay & go live

    Love it? Pay the flat $200 build fee and your site goes live shortly after. Don't love it? Walk away — you owe nothing.

About Bedrock Digital

Built for the people who build everything else.

What We Believe

Five things we won't budge on.

No fine print. These are the rules we run the business by — in plain English.

01

Transparent pricing

One flat fee. No surprises, no creeping monthly add-ons, ever.

02

It sounds like you

Real words written around your story — not a stock template.

03

Tweaks stay free

Need a small change? Just ask. You never pay to fix a typo.

04

No Google gouge

Showing up locally shouldn't cost an extra $500 a month.

05

Real tools, fair price

The people who keep towns running deserve professional tools.

Our Story

I built Bedrock because nobody else did.

I started out running a lawn care company, and later a landscaping company. I did the work, knocked on doors, and ran the books out of a notebook. Like every trade business, I needed a website. I needed marketing. I needed to track money and show up on Google. None of those tools were built for me. Agencies wanted thousands of dollars and weeks of time. DIY platforms wanted hours I didn't have. QuickBooks felt like reading a foreign language.

So I taped together a Facebook page and called it good. I lost jobs because of it. Customers couldn't find me, couldn't trust me, and couldn't see my work. The tools out there were built for office workers and tech companies. They were never built for someone running a crew out of a truck.

Later, I spent time working as a small business consultant for more than 20 startup businesses. That's where it really clicked. I learned what small business owners actually need, what makes a business run efficiently, and what makes one stand out from the pack — and I watched the same gaps show up over and over.

So I went looking again: connected tools for trade businesses, simple, at a fair price. I couldn't find them, so I'm building them. Bedrock is what I wish had existed back then. A connected system for the people who keep their towns running. One profile. One company. Built specifically for you, not adapted from something else.

BN
Brock Niederer
Founder, Bedrock Digital

"Stop doing the business bullsh*t you hate. I'll handle it."

— Brock Niederer, Founder

How It Works

Four steps from here to running.

Bedrock Digital is one connected system. Here's exactly how you go from signing up to running your whole business presence in one place.

1

Build your profile

Create your free account and tell us about your business — trade, service area, contact info. Takes a couple minutes, no credit card. This one profile powers every tool that follows.

Create my account →
2

Analyze your current website — or build a new one

Already have a website? Run the free Optimizer to see exactly how it performs on Google and AI search, with a ranked list of fixes. Don't have one yet? Build a professional site for your trade in about 15 minutes and preview it free.

Analyze my site → Build a new one →
3

Set up your marketing

Open Bedrock Marketing and build your Brand Kit once — colors, fonts, voice, logo. After that, turn out flyers, social posts, door hangers, business cards, and yard signs in minutes. Everything pulls from the same profile you already set up.

Open Marketing →
4

Streamline your operations

Connect your accounting, billing, bidding, invoicing, and purchasing — all in one place. Works with QuickBooks and more. Bedrock Operations and Finance are in development now.

Coming soon
Your Path Through Bedrock

One profile. Then pick your path.

Every contractor starts the same way — then branches off to whatever they need next. Nothing is locked in; add a path whenever it makes sense.

Step 1
Build Your Profile
Trade, service area, contact info — entered once, used by every tool.
Step 2
Analyze or Build Your Website
Run the free Optimizer on the site you have — or build a new one in minutes.
Step 3
Choose Your Path
Three directions from here. Take one, take all three — your call.
Marketing

No accounting degree required. Plain numbers, plain language.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Tap any question to expand the answer.

01 About Bedrock Digital The company & ecosystem
What is Bedrock Digital?

Bedrock Digital is a software company built specifically for trade businesses — plumbers, electricians, HVAC, landscapers, roofers, and other skilled trades. We make a connected ecosystem of tools (website, marketing, SEO, finance) that share one business profile so the contractor never has to set up the same information twice.

What's the difference between Bedrock Digital and a regular web/marketing agency?

Agencies build one thing at a time and charge you a separate fee each time. Bedrock builds a connected platform — your site, marketing, SEO, and finance tools all talk to each other through one profile. Same flat price every month, no surprise invoices, no back-and-forth.

Do I have to buy everything to start?

No. Every Bedrock tool is sold separately. Start with just Sites, just Marketing, or just the Optimizer. Add more anytime — everything you've already entered pre-fills the next tool. Bundles are available if you want more than one.

Where is Bedrock Digital based?

Bedrock is a US-based small business. Founder is currently based in Rexburg, ID, relocating to the Milwaukee area in 2026. We serve contractors nationwide.

How do I get support if something goes wrong?

Email support@bedrock-sites.com — you'll usually get a real reply same day. No tickets, no phone trees.

02 Bedrock Sites — Website Builder Live now
How much does a contractor website cost with Bedrock?

Flat $200 one-time setup fee plus $20/month for hosting, updates, and support. No surprise fees, no annual contracts, no agency markups. You see your complete site before you pay a cent.

How fast can I be live?

Most sites are ready to preview in under 20 minutes. After you approve and pay, your site typically goes live within a few hours — same day you decide.

Do I need any tech skills?

None. Answer a few plain questions about your business, our system builds a complete professional site, you preview it, make any edits you want, then pay when you're happy.

Can I use my own domain?

Yes. Use a domain you already own or we'll help you register a new one. All Bedrock sites include SSL, fast reliable hosting, and custom domain setup — all in the $20/month plan.

What trades is it built for?

Plumbers, electricians, HVAC, landscapers, roofers, painters, flooring, concrete, general contracting — if you do hands-on work and need customers to find you online, this is built for you.

Can I edit my site after it's live?

Yes — through your Client Portal. Change text, hours, phone, photos, services. Small changes are always free. Saved changes redeploy automatically.

03 Bedrock Marketing Brand kit + asset builder
What does Bedrock Marketing actually do?

You set up your Brand Kit once — colors, fonts, voice, logo — then turn out flyers, social posts, door hangers, yard signs, business cards, postcards, email signature banners, and Facebook covers in minutes. Each piece uses your brand automatically. Download as PNG, JPG, or PDF.

Does the AI write my copy?

Only when you ask it to. There's a "Generate copy with AI" button that writes a headline + subhead + call-to-action in your brand voice. You can also type everything manually — the button is optional.

Can I upload my existing logo and materials?

Yes. Upload your logo, and Bedrock will use it on every piece. We're also rolling out a feature to analyze any existing brochure or flyer you upload and pull your colors, fonts, and tone automatically.

Do my materials have to be printed by Bedrock?

No. You download the file (PNG, JPG, or PDF) and use it however you want — take the PDF to a local print shop, post the PNG to Facebook, attach the JPG to an email. Your file, your use.

Does Marketing include Sites or vice versa?

No — each tool is sold separately. They work better together (shared profile) but they're independent products. You can also bundle.

04 Bedrock Optimizer & SEO Search visibility
What does the Optimizer do?

It runs a 12-point audit on your website — mobile speed, local SEO signals, schema markup, page structure, FAQ coverage, and AI-search (GEO) readiness. You get a score out of 100 plus a prioritized fix list. Free.

Can I run the Optimizer on a site I didn't build with Bedrock?

Yes — that's the whole point. Paste in any contractor website URL and we audit it. If you build with Bedrock later, your portal version of the Optimizer also tracks improvements over time.

Will Bedrock also do the SEO fixes for me?

That's Bedrock SEO — the full optimization service. It's the paid version: we implement the schema, page structure, meta tags, and Google Business Profile work the audit flagged. Coming next.

What's "GEO" mean?

Generative Engine Optimization — whether AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Siri) describe your business correctly when someone asks "who's a good plumber in Milwaukee?". It uses FAQ schema, About content, and structured data signals. Bedrock includes GEO setup in every site.

05 Bedrock Operations & Donna Your admin assistant
What is Donna?

She's your operational admin assistant. She handles estimates, invoices, receipts, and scheduling so you can stay on the job.

Does Donna share my pricing information?

No. Your rates and preferences are completely private and used only to build your estimates.

Does Donna send things automatically?

Never. Nothing sends until you review and approve it.

What does Donna connect to?

QuickBooks, Gmail, and Google Calendar. Setup is required — each connection shows its status right in the Operations tab.

06 Bedrock Finance Business visibility
What is Bedrock Finance?

A business visibility dashboard. It shows your revenue, margins, and job profitability in plain language.

Does it replace my accountant or QuickBooks?

No. It reads from QuickBooks (or your uploaded spreadsheet) and displays the data in a way that's easy to understand.

What if I don't use QuickBooks?

Upload an Excel or CSV file. Finance reads it and builds your dashboard from that.

Are the margin numbers accurate?

They're estimates based on available data — not official financial reporting. For taxes and statements, that's still your accountant.

Ready to get started?

Operations AssistantComing Soon

Bedrock Donna

Donna handles the paperwork — estimates, invoices, receipts, and scheduling. Tell her what you need in plain words, she drafts it, and you approve it. She's an office manager that fits in your truck, not another app to learn.

What it does
  • Drafts priced estimates from a plain job description
  • Turns an approved estimate into an invoice
  • Reads receipts from a photo and files them
  • Saves customers and starts a project folder for each
  • Schedules jobs and drafts customer reminders
  • Syncs estimates, invoices, and expenses to QuickBooks
  • Learns your labor rate, markup, and standard fees
What it does not do
  • Send anything to a customer without your approval
  • File taxes or replace your accountant
  • Give legal, tax, or financial advice
  • Move money or touch your bank account
  • Run payroll
  • Make the final call on your pricing
What Donna looks like
Invoice Joe Smith for the patio job
Built it off the approved estimate so the numbers match. Net 30. Take a look — nothing sends till you say so.
Invoice INV-2087 · 600 sq ft Paver Patio
Amount due$5,786
Approve & SendEditReject
Example workflow
  1. Mike finishes a paver patio and tells Donna: "Invoice Joe Smith for the patio job."
  2. Donna pulls the approved estimate and drafts the invoice — Net 30, line items already filled in.
  3. Mike reads it over and taps Approve.
  4. Donna emails it to Joe from Mike's address and logs it in QuickBooks. Start to finish: about 30 seconds.
You approve everything. Donna drafts — she never sends an estimate, invoice, email, or calendar invite on her own. Every action waits for your review. Donna can make mistakes, so the final check is always yours.
Works with QuickBooks Online Gmail Google Calendar
Preview Bedrock Donna →
Business DashboardComing Soon

Bedrock Finance

Understand your margins, track job profitability, and see where your money is going. Finance is a plain-English dashboard — charts and tables, no accounting degree required. It shows you which jobs made money and which ones quietly didn't.

What it does
  • Shows revenue, margin, and expense trends in clear charts
  • Tracks every invoice — paid, outstanding, and overdue
  • Lists the estimates you've sent and where each stands
  • Ranks jobs by profitability so you see what actually paid
  • Filters by time period, service type, and margin
  • Pulls straight from QuickBooks — no manual entry
What it does not do
  • Replace QuickBooks or your accountant
  • Do bookkeeping, reconciliation, or tax filing
  • Send invoices or estimates — that's Donna's job
  • Give financial or tax advice
  • Handle payroll or connect to your bank
  • Let you edit numbers — it's read-only by design
What Finance looks like
Revenue$50,850
Margin47%
Expenses$26,500
Owed$29,200
Example workflow
  1. End of the month, Sarah opens Finance. Graphs page: revenue's up, margin holding at 47%.
  2. Statements page: two invoices are overdue — she sees exactly who owes her and how much.
  3. Projects page: the retaining-wall job ran a thin 26% margin while patios cleared 54%.
  4. Next time she bids a wall, she prices it right. No spreadsheets, no guessing.
Estimates, not official books. Finance is read-only and built for a quick gut check. Margins are estimates based on available data — this is not official financial reporting. For taxes and statements, that's still your accountant.
Works with QuickBooks Online Shares Donna's connection
Open Bedrock Finance →

Free Preview. Pay Only When You Love It.

Four short steps. We do the heavy lifting around your story. You preview the full site free, edit anything you want, and pay only when you're ready to launch. See how it works

Most people finish in 5–20 minutes depending on how much detail they want to include.

— No charge until step 4. See your complete website at no cost. Love it — pay $200. Don't — walk away, no questions asked.

Get Your Site
Step 1 of 4 · About 5 minutes
Tell us about your business
The more you share here, the more personal your site will feel. We use these answers to write your headlines, services, about page, and FAQs — so don't be shy with details. You can edit anything later.
Existing Branding
Do you already have a logo or brand colors?

If you have branding from your truck wrap, business cards, or social media — upload your logo and we'll match your new site to it. You can still tweak any colors below.

Upload Your Logo

PNG, JPG, or SVG. Transparent background looks best. We'll do our best to match your colors — you can fine-tune in the editor.

⤓
Drop your logo here
or
Click to browse
✓ No problem — pick a preset or build your own colors below.
Pick the category that best fits — affects the services we suggest and the language we use on your site.
!Heads up: Since this is a custom trade, our AI won't auto-fill services for you. You'll add your own services below — and the AI will be more conservative about what it claims about your business.
Add cities you serve. Local SEO uses these to find local searchers.
Or use a zip + radius
88%of mobile local searches turn into a call or visit within 24 hours. Adding multiple cities you serve helps Google match you to more local searchers. — Think with Google
Displayed prominently on your site
60%of mobile searchers tap to call straight from search results. A clear phone number makes you easy to reach. — Think with Google
Customers filling out the quote form will email you here
2.7×more likely to be considered trustworthy when your business has complete contact info, including an email. — Google
Select all that apply — we build a section around each one
75%of top-3 ranked local businesses on Google have full service descriptions. Pick 5+ services for the strongest local SEO. — PinMeTo Local Search Stats
Pick a preset, or build your own with the swatch picker. Either way, fully customizable later in the editor.
1. Background tone — light or dark base

We recommend white or cream for a clean look, or dark charcoal for a premium feel.

2. Primary color — navigation bar & section headers
3. Accent color — buttons, links, highlights
See the changes here
Your nav bar
Your headline

Don't worry about getting it perfect now — every color, gradient, and section can be hand-tuned in the editor.

Optional. If you have one, it'll be woven into your copy. Skip if you don't.
This is where we build your whole site from. The more detail you give us, the better. Cover any of these you want to highlight: your background, what makes your business different, the customers you serve, why you started, hours, specialties, family-owned status, years in business, real certifications/licenses you hold, and anything else worth knowing. Hit "Yes — fill it all in" on the next step and we'll build everything around what you write here.
Some ideas to get you started
  • — How long have you been in business?
  • — How did you get here?
  • — How long have you been in this area?
  • — Who do you like to serve?
  • — What do you love about your job?
  • — What makes your business different?
Step 2 of 4 · About 3 minutes
Branding & style
Pick the colors, fonts, and top banner style for your site. Already have a logo? Upload it and we'll match the rest. No logo yet? No problem — we'll suggest a clean palette based on your trade.
Work Photos
Upload photos of your work.

Before/after shots, your truck, equipment, completed jobs. Up to 40 photos. All optional.

⤓
Drop work photos here
or
Click to browse — up to 40 photos, JPG or PNG
No photos? That's fine. We'll use clean placeholders and you can swap in real photos later from your dashboard.
35%more clicks to your website for businesses with photos vs. without. Adding 3+ photos of your work also gets you 42% more direction requests on Google Maps. — Google
Pick Your Fonts
How should your text feel?

Fonts set the tone of your site. Pick the one that fits your business. You can change this later.

Your Domain Name
Pick your web address.

Your domain is included in your $200 — registered in your name and yours to keep forever, even if you cancel your hosting plan later. We suggest a few options based on your business name; pick the one you want.

Already own a domain? No problem — skip this and we'll connect your existing one at no extra cost. Just note it below.
.com
✓ Domain selected: — included in your $200
How it works: We register the domain on your behalf via our registrar account. You get full ownership and a transfer code — take it to any registrar, any time, for free. Annual renewal is included in your hosting plan at no extra charge (as long as renewal cost stays under $20/yr — we'll flag anything over that before renewing).

Changes appear in the preview instantly. Nothing is saved or charged until you approve in Step 4. Welcome to the builder

Here's how it works.

Four short steps. About 10–30 minutes — closer to 10 if you move fast, closer to 30 if you take your time on the story. The first three are setup. The last is your free preview — no payment, no commitment, no charge until you're ready.

1
Tell us about your businessTrade, services, location, and your story. Takes about 5 minutes.
2
Branding & stylePick your colors, fonts, and top banner style. Upload work photos if you have them.
3
Preview & edit your siteSee your full site live. Tweak anything you want — text, photos, sections, colors.
4
Pay & launchApprove, pay $200, and your site goes live. Don't love it? Walk away, no charge.
Tip: You can move back and forth between steps without losing anything. In Step 3, click any section in the live preview to jump to its edit fields. Take your time.

Quick check

A few things are still empty.

Not required — but worth 2 minutes if you have them. Sites with these filled in tend to convert much better.

Create Your Account

One quick step. Create your account.

This is the login you'll use to manage your site later. It saves your build and unlocks your preview — still free, no payment, no charge until you approve and launch.

Your account lets you log in to the client portal and manage your site. We won't share your info or send marketing without your permission.

Client Portal

Manage your site.

Access your Bedrock Sites dashboard to edit your website, view analytics, and manage your account.
